label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are less than 8 years old and weigh less than 12 kg. The data is given in a table, so I should probably go through each penguin one by one and check their age and weight. First, let me list out all the penguins and their details. The header is name, age, height (cm), weight (kg). So the penguins are: 1. Louis, 7, 50, 11 2. Bernard, 5, 80, 13 3. Vincent, 9, 60, 11 4. Gwen, 8, 70, 15 Now, the question is looking for penguins that are less than 8 years old AND weigh less than 12 kg. So both conditions need to be true for the same penguin. Let me check each one. Starting with Louis. His age is 7, which is less than 8. His weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12. So Louis meets both conditions. That's one. Next is Bernard. His age is 5, which is under 8. His weight is 13 kg. Oh, 13 is more than 12, so he doesn't meet the weight requirement. So Bernard doesn't count. Only age is good, but weight isn't. Third is Vincent. His age is 9. Wait, 9 is more than 8, so he automatically doesn't meet the age condition. So even though his weight is 11 kg, which is under 12, the age disqualifies him. So Vincent is out. Fourth is Gwen. Her age is 8. The condition is less than 8, so 8 is not less than 8. So her age doesn't meet the criteria. Her weight is 15 kg, which is over 12, so she doesn't meet either condition. So Gwen is out. So only Louis meets both conditions. Let me double-check.
